description_long: This is a stylized cowboy doll with a large brown hat, a yellow plaid shirt, and a cow-print vest. The doll features a red neckerchief, blue jeans, and brown cowboy boots with spurs, evoking a classic Western theme. Its face is expressive, with a wide smile, large eyes, and prominent eyebrows, giving it a friendly and approachable appearance. The arms are outstretched horizontally, and the hands are open, while the legs are straight and slightly apart. The doll's clothing is detailed with visible stitching, buttons, and a holster on the right hip. The overall build is slender, with exaggerated proportions typical of animated or cartoon-inspired toys.
description: A stylized cowboy doll with a brown hat, yellow plaid shirt, cow-print vest, blue jeans, and brown boots, featuring a friendly, smiling face.
description_view_0: Front view shows the doll's smiling face, red neckerchief, yellow plaid shirt, cow-print vest, blue jeans, and brown boots.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the hat's brim, the holster, and the layered clothing details.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the hat, the cow-print vest, red neckerchief, and the back of the boots and jeans.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the profile of the face, hat, holster, and the side seam details of the clothing.
attribute_clothing_style: Classic Western cowboy attire with a brown wide-brimmed hat, yellow plaid long-sleeve shirt, black and white cow-print vest, red neckerchief, blue jeans, brown cowboy boots with spurs, and a brown holster.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with arms extended horizontally to the sides, legs straight and slightly apart, head facing forward, and hands open.
attribute_facial_expression: Smiling expression with wide eyes, raised eyebrows, and an open, friendly mouth.
attribute_hair_style: Short, straight brown hair visible beneath the hat, neatly combed.
